payload.reason: Plan review v1 (Claude subagent APPROVE+3NIT; codex 2 MAJOR+2 MINOR). Fixing to v2: (M1) codex.md 'super-harness (Codex)' inline-backtick → plain text (doc-refs). (M2 scope) hot-path 'Claude Code only' framing stale after Codex ships — concepts.md:51 / overview.md:27 / ARCHITECTURE.md:72; add concepts.md to scope, new task reconciles all three, expand Task-10 grep. (m1) overview/ARCHITECTURE enumerate 'PreToolUse + SessionStart' but omit Stop → +Stop. (m2) codex.md 'Capabilities' section → rename 'Installed hooks' (describes the 3 installed hooks; post_tool_use_hook is a capability not an installed hook). NITs: zh README re-add Spec Kit/OpenSpec/Superpowers names + align Links order to English. Kept: codex facts/trust/matcher/registry all verified accurate.

Plan v2 resolves v1 findings (Claude subagent + codex): M1 codex.md backtick→plain; M2 hot-path 'Claude Code only' reconciled in new Task 10 (concepts.md added to scope→12 files, overview/ARCHITECTURE hot-path lines) + expanded Task-11 grep; m1 +Stop in overview/ARCHITECTURE hook enumeration; m2 codex.md section 'Capabilities'→'Installed hooks'; zh NITs (tool names + Links order). codex facts/registry/trust all verified accurate.

Code review v1 (Claude subagent APPROVE+2NIT; codex 1 MAJOR+1 MINOR). Fix v2: (MAJOR) codex.md coverage caveat parroted the source AGENTS text 'intercepts only simple shell + apply_patch', which is misleading — the installed matcher is ^(apply_patch|Edit|Write)$ and the same source says Bash is never gated. Rewrite to the actual matcher (gates the edit tools apply_patch/Edit/Write, in practice apply_patch; does NOT gate Bash/shell or WebSearch). (MINOR, KEPT) zh README translator note 'deep docs English-only' — appropriate localization for a translated landing page, English readers don't need it; Claude reviewer agreed it's fine. Source codex.py AGENTS subsection has the same confusing 'simple shell' wording — out of this docs scope, logged to OPEN-ITEMS for a follow-up code fix.

findings.note: RESOLVED in v2. Two-actor code review (Claude subagent APPROVE + codex exec --sandbox read-only). codex MAJOR: docs/adapters/codex.md coverage caveat parroted the source AGENTS text "intercepts only simple shell + apply_patch", which is misleading — the installed matcher is ^(apply_patch|Edit|Write)$ and the same source says Bash is never gated. Rewritten to the accurate matcher-based wording (gates the edit tools apply_patch/Edit/Write, in practice apply_patch; does not gate Bash/shell or WebSearch; CI cold floor backs the gap). doc check re-run = 0.

KEPT with rationale. codex flagged the README.zh-CN.md translator note ("deep docs are English-only") as having no English counterpart; the Claude reviewer judged it appropriate localization for a translated landing page. Kept — it sets expectations for zh readers and is not a product claim; English readers do not need it. Also codex noted the source codex.py _AGENTS_MD_SUBSECTION carries the same confusing "simple shell" wording — that is a CODE change out of this docs cut's scope; logged to private/OPEN-ITEMS.md for a follow-up.
